category_title: Braille-reading students with blindness and ASD who struggle with task initiation, sensory overload, and visually-based instructions
scenario_title: Math task initiation with visually-based instructions
minimal_context: The student is expected to begin a math assignment in a noisy, fast-paced regular classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright, it is time to start the math assignment. Look up here at the front to see the problems we are doing today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits still without taking out materials) The teacher needs to tell me exactly what to take out and what to do, otherwise I don't know where to start.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just get your math materials out quickly and look at the first section. We need to move fast today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It's difficult when you have to think fast and answer fast and do things fast all the time. The noise from the other students is making it hard to concentrate.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try your best to focus on the assignment. Look here at this example, and then look there at the next page.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: They tell everyone to 'look here' and 'look there'... but I can't look so I don't understand what they mean. It's bad when they say that.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Alright, it is time to start the math assignment. Look up here at the front to see the problems we are doing today.

STUDENT: (Sits still without taking out materials) The teacher needs to tell me exactly what to take out and what to do, otherwise I don't know where to start.

TUTOR: Just get your math materials out quickly and look at the first section. We need to move fast today.

STUDENT: It's difficult when you have to think fast and answer fast and do things fast all the time. The noise from the other students is making it hard to concentrate.

TUTOR: Try your best to focus on the assignment. Look here at this example, and then look there at the next page.

STUDENT: They tell everyone to 'look here' and 'look there'... but I can't look so I don't understand what they mean. It's bad when they say that.

task.content: Math assignment, which is considered difficult and boring

context.environment: Regular class with distracting noise and bustle
context.social_setting: Large class where other students disturb them

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher uses visually based language, telling everyone to 'look here' and 'look there'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Displays confusion and does not know what the teacher means
related_quotes: They tell everyone to ‘look here’ and ‘look there’… but I can’t look so I don’t understand what they mean. It’s bad when they say that

behavior_patterns.condition: When given unstructured tasks or too much responsibility is left to the student
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Neither knows how to begin, nor complete a task independently; requires someone to push the 'start button' all the time
related_quotes: The teacher needs to tell me exactly what to take out and what to do, otherwise I don’t know where to start
